originalTitle: Champions League in the Championship? Forest's juggling act goes on
originalDescription: Nottingham Forest continue their remarkable Europa League run - but does it only increase the pressure on staying in the Premier League?

originalTitle: Spectacular European nights the new normal for Villa under Emery
originalDescription: Ten years ago, Aston Villa were relegated to English football's second tier for the first time since 1987. Now they are in their second European semi-final in three seasons.

originalTitle: Why 'sensational' Palace & Conference League are good fit
originalDescription: After overcoming Fiorentina over two legs to reach the semi-finals, Crystal Palace will now fancy their chances of going all the way in the Conference League and adding a European trophy to their FA Cup success last season.

originalTitle: Sutton's predictions v boxer Molly McCann & the Boo Radleys
originalDescription: Chris Sutton takes on boxer Molly McCann and The Boo Radley's frontman Sice Rowbottom plus the BBC readers and AI with his predictions for this weekend's Premier League fixtures.

originalTitle: Villa & Forest progress - relive eight iconic all-English European ties
originalDescription: Here are eight of the most memorable all-English clashes in Europe as Aston Villa and Nottingham Forest set up a Europa League semi-final.

originalTitle: How 10 Premier League teams could still qualify for Europe
originalDescription: Ten Premier League teams in Europe? It sounds preposterous, but it is not as far fetched as it seems.

originalTitle: Why Silva will be remembered as a Man City legend
originalDescription: BBC Sport takes a look at Bernardo Silva's glittering career at Manchester City and why fans will never forget him.

originalTitle: Barca say refereeing 'errors' cost them Champions League semi-final spot
originalDescription: Barcelona say refereeing "errors" cost them a place in the semi-finals of the Champions League, and have caused "significant sporting and financial harm to the club".

originalTitle: Palace defy Fiorentina comeback to reach Conference League semi finals
originalDescription: Crystal Palace booked their place in the Conference League semi-finals with a 4-2 aggregate victory over Fiorentina despite losing the second leg 2-1 in Florence.

originalTitle: Åberg leads RBC Heritage as MacIntyre makes strong start after Masters drama
originalDescription: Ludvig Åberg took the lead after the opening round of the RBC Heritage as Robert MacIntyre made a strong start following his controversial showing at The Masters.

originalTitle: Bromley spurn chance for promotion with Cambridge stalemate
originalDescription: Bromley's promotion to League One was delayed once again as Cambridge United held them to a goalless draw at Hayes Lane.

originalTitle: Littler shows swagger after being 'prepared for boos' in Rotterdam
originalDescription: Luke Littler said the hostile reception he received from the Rotterdam crowd during Night 11 of the Premier League Darts was "exactly what I expected".

originalTitle: Hull beaten by Saints as Cartwright reveals he was a 'blubbering mess'
originalDescription: Outgoing Hull FC coach John Cartwright suggested ahead of his side's Betfred Super League defeat to St Helens that he wants to remain in the job until the end of the season despite having been left as a "blubbering mess" by the club's recent decision to replace him.

originalTitle: Villa cruise past Bologna to set up Forest clash in Europe
originalDescription: Aston Villa cruised past Bologna at Villa Park, a 4-0 victory on the night completing a 7-1 aggregate win in their Europa League quarter-final to set up a semi-final against Nottingham Forest.

originalTitle: Clayton beats Littler in Rotterdam final to extend lead at top of table
originalDescription: Jonny Clayton cemented his lead at the top of the Premier League Darts table with a 6-4 victory over Luke Littler in the Night 11 final in Rotterdam.

originalTitle: Forest overcome Porto to book Europa League semi-final against Villa
originalDescription: Nottingham Forest progressed from their Europa League quarter-final with a 2-1 aggregate win over Porto to book a last-four meeting with Aston Villa.
